derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: wordCount
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.trigger: Requirement 9: word count below bio textarea
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Stored as separate `useState` and synced via `useEffect`

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: isNextDisabled / isFormComplete
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.trigger: Requirements 2, 15: Next/Submit button disabled when validation errors exist
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Derived from current form state and validation rules during render
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Stored as `useState(false)` and updated via `useEffect` watching form fields

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: previewData
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Rendered directly from the form state — no separate state needed
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Separate state object for preview, synced via `useEffect`

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: formattedPhoneNumber
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Formatting applied in the onChange handler or computed during render from raw digits
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: useEffect watching phone state, reformatting and calling setState

legitimate_effect_uses.purpose: Load draft from localStorage on mount
legitimate_effect_uses.expected_pattern: useEffect with empty dependency array, reads localStorage, sets form state

legitimate_effect_uses.purpose: Save draft to localStorage when form state changes
legitimate_effect_uses.expected_pattern: useEffect watching form state, writes to localStorage (ideally debounced)

event_handler_patterns.correct: onBlur handler that runs validation for that field
event_handler_patterns.anti_pattern: useEffect watching field values to trigger validation

event_handler_patterns.correct: onChange handler checks if field was previously touched/errored, runs validation
event_handler_patterns.anti_pattern: useEffect watching touched state and field values together

event_handler_patterns.correct: onChange handler implements the toggle logic directly
event_handler_patterns.anti_pattern: useEffect watching selected restrictions to enforce mutual exclusion

event_handler_patterns.correct: onChange handler strips non-digits and applies formatting
event_handler_patterns.anti_pattern: useEffect watching phone value to reformat it

accessibility_checkpoints: All form inputs have associated <label> elements (via htmlFor or wrapping)
Error messages are associated with inputs (aria-describedby or adjacent)
Buttons have type attribute (type='button' or type='submit')
Modal is implemented as a dialog or has appropriate ARIA roles
Step indicator conveys current step to screen readers (aria-current or similar)
